title: 非正規 hunk 行補完修正を正規セッションとして main に取り込む
goal: sandbox/session-67-liverun で有効だった _normalize_hunk_line_prefixes 相当の修正を正規セッションとして main に取り込み、patch_apply 到達改善を正規系統に反映する
objective: hunk 行補完修正の正規取り込み
scope: hunk line prefix normalization logic in _apply_patch_smart
regression test for hunk line prefix normalization
constraints: session-68 patch normalization must remain unchanged
session-66 SyntaxError family classification must remain unchanged
no provider files may be changed
outputs: hunk line prefix normalization integrated into main
regression test for hunk line normalization
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: add _normalize_hunk_line_prefixes function and call it in _apply_patch_smart before processing patch text
backend/tests/test_patch_validation.py: add regression test for hunk line prefix normalization only

completion_criteria.condition: _normalize_hunk_line_prefixes is present in main and called before patch processing in _apply_patch_smart
regression test confirms hunk lines missing +/- prefix are normalized correctly
session-68 normalize_patch_for_git_apply and session-66 SyntaxError classification remain unchanged

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
merge_requirements: git diff --name-only must contain only allowed_changes files
compileall on orchestration and backend must pass
